---
title: "fetch_data: infant_icd (NESTED)"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

working_dir <- find_repo_root()
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/all_functions.R"))
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/nested_ingestion.R"))

registry <- load_registry()
site <- "GNV"

components <- names(registry$datasets$infant_icd$components)
components <- setdiff(components, "schema_map")

all_dx <- map_df(components, function(comp) {
  raw <- read_standardized_dataset("infant_icd", comp, site, registry)
  raw$data %>%
    mutate(dx_category = comp,
           part_id_infant = paste0("infant-", part_id_infant_tmp)) %>%
    select(part_id_infant, dx_category, dx_date, dx_code, dx_descrip, dx_type)
})

out_dir <- get_processed_dir(site)
save(all_dx, file = file.path(out_dir, "infant_icd_nested.rda"))
```
